verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 is a type I integral membrane protein localized to the trans-Golgi network (TGN), a non-PM endomembrane compartment. It cycles between early endosomes and the TGN as part of the secretory pathway's sorting and vesicle-formation machinery. No evidence of stable surface localization, GPI anchoring, or ectodomain shedding; the protein body does not reach the outer face of the plasma membrane.
